title: ChaCha20-Poly1305 and Algorithm Choice · Language Lens: Crypto Go Aead Selection
summary: A mobile product chooses an AEAD from benchmark folklore, mixes XChaCha and IETF nonce formats, and assumes changing algorithms repairs nonce reuse. Predict the asset, adversary, security property, trust boundary, and falsifying evidence before opening the governing standard. Planned artifact: Add and verify the aead selection increment in portable AEAD selection and compatibility matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidenc…
objectives: Choose AES-GCM or ChaCha20-Poly1305 from platform acceleration, protocol requirements, misuse risk, compliance, interoperability, and measured performance.
Distinguish standard and XChaCha nonce sizes, interoperability, random-nonce design, and protocol compatibility.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Predict Crypto Go Aead Selection · Theory Crypto Go Aead Selection
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory cryptographic engineering team handles case 3824 during a post-quantum compatibility canary. Build deterministic Go evidence to select and verify standard or XChaCha20-Poly1305 with exact sizes, AAD, vectors, and interoperability; reject toy, obsolete, unauthenticated, self-signed-trust, downgrade, and security-by-obscurity shortcuts; then remove one transfer gate and state exactly which production claim is no longer supported. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Choose AES-GCM or ChaCha20-Poly1305 from platform acceleration, protocol requirements, misuse risk, compliance, interoperability, and measured performance.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Crypto Go Aead Selection contract for the supplied data.
